database.description: Comprehensive SQLite database of academic papers on Large Language Models

useful_queries.find_landmark_papers: SELECT title, year, category FROM papers WHERE is_landmark = 1 ORDER BY category
useful_queries.papers_by_category: SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM papers GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
useful_queries.top_cited_papers: SELECT title, citation_count FROM papers ORDER BY citation_count DESC LIMIT 10
useful_queries.papers_by_year: SELECT year, COUNT(*) FROM papers WHERE year IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year ORDER BY year DESC
useful_queries.find_paper_descendants: SELECT DISTINCT p2.title, p2.category FROM lineage l JOIN papers p1 ON l.predecessor_paper_id = p1.id JOIN papers p2 ON l.successor_paper_id = p2.id WHERE p1.title = ? ORDER BY p2.year
useful_queries.find_paper_ancestors: SELECT DISTINCT p1.title, p1.category FROM lineage l JOIN papers p1 ON l.predecessor_paper_id = p1.id JOIN papers p2 ON l.successor_paper_id = p2.id WHERE p2.title = ? ORDER BY p1.year DESC
useful_queries.papers_in_category: SELECT title, year, citation_count FROM papers WHERE category = ? ORDER BY citation_count DESC
useful_queries.find_by_arxiv: SELECT title, year, category FROM papers WHERE arxiv_id = ?
useful_queries.find_by_doi: SELECT title, year, category FROM papers WHERE doi = ?
useful_queries.relevance_scores_by_category: SELECT category, title, relevance_score FROM papers WHERE category = ? ORDER BY relevance_score DESC
